title: Travel Agent

rationales.taskAutomation: Flight and hotel research, price comparison, and basic itinerary building are exactly the tasks AI trip-planning tools now perform end-to-end for standard trips.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI trip-planning assistants and booking-platform AI features are mature and widely available to consumers directly.
rationales.adoption: Consumer self-service booking via AI tools is now the default path for most travelers; agents retain a smaller, more complex client base.
rationales.agenticExposure: Research, comparison, and itinerary assembly form a classic agent-ownable research-and-book workflow for standard trips.

tasksAtRisk: Standard itinerary building for common destinations
tasksGrowing: Complex multi-destination and group itinerary design
Handling disruptions, cancellations, and rebooking under pressure
High-touch advisory for luxury and corporate travel
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 41-3041, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: AI trip-planning tool integration into client service

insight: AI trip planners already out-research most human agents on a standard beach vacation, comparing hundreds of fares and itineraries in seconds. The agents still working are the ones handling what breaks: a canceled flight mid-trip, a ten-stop corporate itinerary, or a client who wants judgment, not just options.
